_comment: Golden source-derived fields captured by running kbexplorer-template's scripts/generate-manifest.js (generateManifest()) against ./manifest-repo, then keeping only the fields buildManifest() derives from a RepoSource's local (FileSystemSource) acquisition path. Volatile/live-GitHub fields (issues, pullRequests, commits, branches, repoMetadata, generatedAt) are intentionally excluded — they come from `gh`/`git` CLI calls the template script makes directly and are NOT part of the RepoSource/RepoData contract FileSystemSource implements for local mode (see filesystem-source.test.ts). `tree` entries are compared ignoring `size`: FileSystemSource's walk() (existing, pre-#17 behavior) does not stat files, while the template's walkFileSystem() does — an existing, out-of-scope engine/template divergence, not something buildManifest introduces. Regenerated for anokye-labs/kbexplorer-engine#23 after adding nodemap.yaml and a theme.themesFile to the fixture so nodemapRaw/nodemapFiles/nodemapDirs/themeFileRaw are exercised with real (non-null) content, not just proven absent.

authoredContent.content/alpha.md:
---
id: alpha
title: Alpha
cluster: core
---
# Alpha

Body alpha.
authoredContent.content/beta.md:
---
id: beta
title: Beta
cluster: core
---
# Beta

Body beta.

structuralFiles..github/workflows/ci.yml:
name: CI
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: echo hi

configRaw:
clusters:
  core:
    name: Core
    color: '#000000'
theme:
  themesFile: content/themes/extra.yaml
nodemapRaw:
nodes:
  - id: alpha
    file: content/alpha.md
  - id: content-files
    glob: "content/*.md"
    each: file
  - id: content-model-dir
    directory: content-model

---
